title: CHILDREN AND FAMILY PROGRAMS - 211info
text: HEALTHY U CHILDREN AND FAMILY PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers various programs for families and children to support child and family health including All Around Kids Community Preschool, weekly Music and Magic for caregivers and children, and biannual, in-person parenting classes. 535 E River Street Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Preschool: Ages 3-5 Music and Magic: Ages 0-5 and their caregivers Hours: Preschool: Monday-Thursday, 1-5pm Music and Magic: Monday 10:30am-noon Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Cave Junction, Kerby, O'Brien, Selma, and zip code 97523 TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the very back of the Illinois Valley Family Coalition Resource Center. Services: Parent/Family Involvement in Education Preschools School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - WELLNESS PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEALTHY U
